issues.detail: The skill example covers basic error handling but does not address all potential error scenarios and edge cases such as database failures or malformed input.
Only one code example is provided; additional realistic examples would improve demonstration coverage.

scenarios.name: authenticated-user-crud
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the critical router setup and route grouping; A provides more of the required handlers and middleware, so it scores higher.

scenarios.name: admin-subrouter-with-cors
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric, creating the main router, applying RequestID, mounting an admin sub‑router with at least one route, and configuring CORS to allow only GET and POST from https://admin.example.com.
